statements.notes: On the go
On-the-go sleep support
2.5 mg Melatonin
Dietary Supplement
Pour into mouth. No water needed.
Directions: Adults, one stick 30 minutes before bedtime, as needed for occasional sleeplessness.
Do not exceed suggested use.
Keep out of reach of children.

Pouch contains individual stick packs. Do not use if stick is torn or broken.
Warnings: Do not consume any alcohol while taking melatonin. Do not drive or operate heavy machinery while taking melatonin. Do not take with other melatonin-containing products. Consult a healthcare professional if you are experiencing long-term sleep difficulties.
This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
5 - 0.03 oz. (1g) Sticks

labelText.raw: Essential vitamins and minerals to fill real diet gaps 30 day supply Multivitamin Supplement
labelText.searchText: Vitamin A Beta-Carotene Vitamin A (Form: as Beta Carotene) Vitamin C Calcium Ascorbate Vitamin C (Form: as Calcium Ascorbate) Vitamin D3 Cholecalciferol Vitamin E D-Alpha-Tocopherol Vitamin B6 Pyridoxal 5-Phosphate Monohydrate Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin Vitamin B12 (Form: as Methylcobalamin) Choline Choline Bitartrate Choline (Form: as Choline Bitartrate) Calcium Calcareous Marine Algae Magnesium Magnesium Hydroxide Potassium Potassium Citrate Silica Bamboo extract Boron Boron Rice Protein Chelate Mixed Tocopherols D-Beta Tocopherol D-Delta-Tocopherol D-Gamma-Tocopherol Vitamin K2 Menaquinone-7 Essential vitamins and minerals to fill real diet gaps 30 day supply Multivitamin Supplement

ingredients.name: Vitamin A
ingredients.notes: Variable based on fat intake; requires conversion to active Vitamin A.

ingredients.name: Vitamin C
ingredients.notes: Combined with vitamin C, offering a buffered form of calcium that is gentle on the stomach.

ingredients.name: Vitamin D3
ingredients.notes: Preferred form, identical to the vitamin D produced by skin exposure to sunlight. Highly bioavailable and well retained.

ingredients.name: Vitamin E
ingredients.notes: Natural RRR form, preferentially retained and utilized by the body, offering superior biological activity to synthetic forms.

ingredients.name: Vitamin B6
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Vitamin B12
ingredients.notes: Bioactive methyl form. No conversion needed. Best for neuro support, MTHFR.

ingredients.name: Choline
ingredients.notes: A basic salt form of Choline; it is cost-effective but has limited brain uptake compared to more advanced forms like Alpha-GPC or Citicoline.

ingredients.name: Calcium
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Magnesium
ingredients.notes: Milk of magnesia - primarily antacid/laxative, minimal systemic absorption.

ingredients.name: Potassium
ingredients.notes: A highly bioavailable organic salt of Potassium; it is alkalizing and kidney-friendly, commonly used for urinary and bone health, and to support blood pressure.

ingredients.name: Silica
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Boron
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Mixed Tocopherols
ingredients.notes: Full spectrum natural form including alpha, beta, gamma, and delta tocopherols. Offers broader antioxidant benefits than alpha-tocopherol alone.

ingredients.name: Vitamin K2
ingredients.notes: Long-chain form of K2, known for its long half-life and superior bioavailability, particularly beneficial for bone and cardiovascular health.

ingredients_scorable.name: Vitamin A
ingredients_scorable.notes: Variable based on fat intake; requires conversion to active Vitamin A.

ingredients_scorable.name: Vitamin C
ingredients_scorable.notes: Combined with vitamin C, offering a buffered form of calcium that is gentle on the stomach.

30 day supply

Do not use if inner seal is torn or broken.

ingredients.name: Magnesium
ingredients.notes: Milk of magnesia - primarily antacid/laxative, minimal systemic absorption.

ingredients.name: L-Theanine
ingredients.notes: Form not specified; conservative scoring applied. Consider using a specific form for better bioavailability.

ingredients.name: Lemon Balm extract
ingredients.notes: Calming herb; stress and sleep support

statements.notes: Essential vitamins and minerals for mom and baby
30 day supply
Multivitamin Supplement
Adults, take three tablets daily with water and food.
Ferrochel and TRAACS are trademarks of Albion Laboratories, Inc. U.S. Patent 7,838,042.

Warning: Accidental overdose of iron-containing products is a leading cause of fatal poisoning in children under 6. Keep this product out of reach of children. In case of accidental overdose, call a doctor or poison control center immediately.
For adults only.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Consult physician if pregnant/nursing, taking medications, or have a medical condition.
Keep out of reach of children.
Do not use if packet seal is torn broken.

labelText.raw: Essential vitamins and minerals for mom and baby 30 day supply Multivitamin Supplement Adults, take three tablets daily with water and food. Ferrochel and TRAACS are trademarks of Albion Laboratories, Inc. U.S. Patent 7,838,042. Warning: Accidental overdose of iron-containing products is a leading cause of fatal poisoning in children under 6. Keep this product out of reach of children. In case of accidental overdose, call a doctor or poison control center immediately. For adults only. Consult physician if pregnant/nursing, taking medications, or have a medical condition. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if packet seal is torn broken.

warnings: Keep out of reach of children
If pregnant, nursing, or taking any medications, consult a healthcare professional before use
parsed.directions: Adults, take three tablets daily with water and food.

labelText.searchText: Vitamin A Beta-Carotene Vitamin A (Form: as Beta Carotene) Vitamin C Calcium Ascorbate Vitamin C (Form: as Calcium Ascorbate) Vitamin D3 Cholecalciferol Vitamin D3 (Alt. Name: Cholecalciferol) Note: 1000 IU Vitamin E D-Alpha-Tocopherol Vitamin B6 Pyridoxal 5-Phosphate Folate L-5-Methyltetrahydrofolate Methylfolate Vitamin B12 Methylcobalamin Vitamin B12 (Form: as Methycobalamin) Biotin Pantothenic Acid D-Calcium Pantothenate Pantothenic Acid (Form: as D Calcium Pantothenate) Choline Choline Bitartrate Choline (Form: as Choline Bitartrate) Calcium Calcareous Marine Algae Iron Ferrous Bisglycinate Chelate Iodine Iodine Rice Protein Chelate Magnesium Magnesium Hydroxide Zinc Zinc Rice Protein Chelate Selenium L-Selenomethionine Selenium (Form: as L-Selenomethionine) Copper Copper Rice Protein Chelate Chromium Chromium Nicotinate Glycinate Chelate Potassium Potassium Citrate Silica Bamboo extract Boron Boron Rice Protein Chelate Mixed Tocopherols D-Beta Tocopherol D-Delta-Tocopherol D-Gamma-Tocopherol Vitamin K2 Menaquinone-7 Gum Blend Cocoa powder Rice Extract Rice extract blend Guar Gum Rice Film Coating Natural Flavors Essential vitamins and minerals for mom and baby 30 day supply Multivitamin Supplement Adults, take three tablets daily with water and food. Ferrochel and TRAACS are trademarks of Albion Laboratories, Inc. U.S. Patent 7,838,042. Warning: Accidental overdose of iron-containing products is a leading cause of fatal poisoning in children under 6. Keep this product out of reach of children. In case of accidental overdose, call a doctor or poison control center immediately. For adults only. Consult physician if pregnant/nursing, taking medications, or have a medical condition. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if packet seal is torn broken.

ingredients.name: Vitamin A
ingredients.notes: Variable based on fat intake; requires conversion to active Vitamin A.

ingredients.name: Vitamin C
ingredients.notes: Combined with vitamin C, offering a buffered form of calcium that is gentle on the stomach.

ingredients.name: Vitamin D3
ingredients.notes: Preferred form, identical to the vitamin D produced by skin exposure to sunlight. Highly bioavailable and well retained.

ingredients.name: Vitamin E
ingredients.notes: Natural RRR form, preferentially retained and utilized by the body, offering superior biological activity to synthetic forms.

ingredients.name: Vitamin B6
ingredients.notes: Active coenzyme form, directly utilized by the body without conversion. Preferred form for optimal bioavailability.

ingredients.name: Folate
ingredients.notes: Active form, bypasses the MTHFR enzyme conversion, making it highly effective for all individuals.

ingredients.name: Methylfolate
ingredients.notes: Active form, bypasses the MTHFR enzyme conversion, making it highly effective for all individuals.

ingredients.name: Vitamin B12
ingredients.notes: Bioactive methyl form. No conversion needed. Best for neuro support, MTHFR.

ingredients.name: Biotin
ingredients.notes: Standard synthetic form, widely used. Effective for general supplementation.

ingredients.name: Pantothenic Acid
ingredients.notes: Stable synthetic form, widely used in supplements and fortified foods.

ingredients.name: Choline
ingredients.notes: A basic salt form of Choline; it is cost-effective but has limited brain uptake compared to more advanced forms like Alpha-GPC or Citicoline.

ingredients.name: Calcium
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Iron
ingredients.notes: Ferrochel/TRAACS chelated iron. 2-4x more bioavailable than sulfate. Gentle on stomach, less food interference.

ingredients.name: Iodine
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Magnesium
ingredients.notes: Milk of magnesia - primarily antacid/laxative, minimal systemic absorption.

ingredients.name: Zinc
ingredients.notes: Unspecified - often oxide in cheap products.

ingredients.name: Selenium
ingredients.notes: Organic form, best absorbed and retained by the body, as it's incorporated into proteins similar to dietary selenium.

ingredients.name: Copper
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Chromium
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Potassium
ingredients.notes: A highly bioavailable organic salt of Potassium; it is alkalizing and kidney-friendly, commonly used for urinary and bone health, and to support blood pressure.

ingredients.name: Silica
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Boron
ingredients.notes: Unspecified form; conservative scoring to avoid over-crediting.

ingredients.name: Mixed Tocopherols
ingredients.notes: Full spectrum natural form including alpha, beta, gamma, and delta tocopherols. Offers broader antioxidant benefits than alpha-tocopherol alone.

ingredients.name: Vitamin K2
ingredients.notes: Long-chain form of K2, known for its long half-life and superior bioavailability, particularly beneficial for bone and cardiovascular health.

ingredients_scorable.notes: Variable based on fat intake; requires conversion to active Vitamin A.
